title: Simple Voice Megaphone
description: A small mod, that adds megaphone item, that allows you to talk further when used
body:
[GITHUB PAGE](https://github.com/deniskerstens/simple-voice-megaphone)|[ISSUES](https://github.com/deniskerstens/simple-voice-megaphone/issues)|[OLD GITHUB PAGE(0.2.0, and before)](https://github.com/deniskerstens/simple-voice-megaphone-old-repo)

Megaphone increases speaking distance by 2 times(configurable, but 2 is default), so if you have 48 blocks in simple voice chat config it will increase it to 96 when using the megaphone item

You need to hold RMB when holding the item for it to work

-------------------
## Requirements:
### Forge and Fabric:
* [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
* [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)(for mod versions 1.0.0+)
### Fabric:
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Plans:
| Planned | Work in progress | Done |
|---------------------|-----------------------|----------------------|
| 1.21.1(and other 1.21.* versions) support |  | Megaphone item, that increases distance you can speak(0.0.1+) |
| ⭐Config support for fabric |  | Configurable distance increase(0.1.0+) |
|  |  | Make it sound like a megaphone, and not just increase distance(0.2.0+) |
|  |  | Fabric port(1.0.0) |

⭐ - Priority

## Supported languages:
* English
* Russian

## Recipe:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/skfbT4IB/images/e04e0ff34f95da1f73366e198ec0935f845dada4.png)

----------------

If you want to suggest any new features to the mod, or found any glitches feel free to suggest/report them [here](https://github.com/deniskerstens/simple-voice-megaphone/issues)

--------------

Just a small mod I made for fun.

I did A LOT of googling during the coding process, and it was a lot of fun to me :)

I honestly never wrote a mod before, like I tried using mcreator(this mod was written in java, not mcreator), but I didnt really do something good or at least playable, so I consider this my first mod
